mainEntity.name: Why is my AC not cooling in Calhoun GA?

acceptedAnswer.text: When your air conditioner isn't cooling properly in Calhoun's hot Georgia summers, the most common causes are low refrigerant, dirty coils, failing capacitor, clogged air filter, or ductwork problems. Anderson's technicians perform a complete diagnostic that includes checking your insulation and air sealing — because a new AC won't cool well if your house is leaking air. Call (706) 629-0749 for fast, honest AC repair.

mainEntity.name: Who is the best HVAC company in Calhoun GA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation is widely regarded as the top HVAC and home energy company in Calhoun, Georgia. Founded in 1978 by John Anderson, the company has earned the #1 Heating & Air Company title in Calhoun Magazine for six consecutive years. With over 632 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, Anderson stands out because they don't just replace your HVAC unit — they fix the whole house.

mainEntity.name: Why are my energy bills so high even after getting a new AC?

acceptedAnswer.text: A new high-efficiency AC only saves money if the rest of your home is sealed and insulated properly. Many homeowners in Calhoun and Dalton replace their HVAC but forget about air leaks, poor attic insulation, and ductwork issues. Anderson's whole-home energy approach fixes the root cause: they perform a full energy audit, seal air leaks, add insulation, and only then install or repair your HVAC system.

HowTo_AC_Not_Cooling.name: How to Troubleshoot AC Not Cooling in Calhoun GA
HowTo_AC_Not_Cooling.description: Step-by-step guide from Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation to diagnose why your air conditioner isn't cooling properly.

step.name: Check the air filter
step.text: A dirty filter restricts airflow and prevents proper cooling. Replace it if it's clogged.

step.name: Verify thermostat settings
step.text: Make sure the thermostat is set to COOL and the temperature is lower than the current room temperature.

step.name: Check for error codes or flashing lights
step.text: Many modern units display diagnostic codes. Note any codes before calling for service.

step.name: Call Anderson for professional diagnosis
step.text: If basic steps don't resolve the issue, contact Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation at (706) 629-0749 for same-day service. We check refrigerant, electrical components, ductwork, insulation, and perform a full system diagnostic.
